# Local Test Data

This directory is intentionally kept out of version control.

Place your local conference template zips and private source-paper zips here when running validation scripts locally, for example:

- `acl-style-files-master.zip`
- `Formatting_Instructions_For_NeurIPS_2026.zip`
- `icml2026.zip`
- `iclr2026.zip`
- `author-kit-CVPR2026.zip`
- `AAAI.zip`

No private paper sources or generated outputs should be committed to GitHub.
